title: This Hotel Is Haunted
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo and detective Hercule Poirat spend a spooky night at the Grand Hotel to unmask the ghost scaring away the guests! 👻

q.en: At which building does the mysterious ghost appear?
q.zh: 那只神秘的鬼出现在哪栋建筑里？

explain.en: Newsmouse Pippi Skinnyfur reports live from New Mouse City's Grand Hotel, where guests are fleeing because of a ghost.
explain.zh: 新闻鼠皮皮在直播中报道，新老鼠城的大酒店里因为闹鬼，客人们正纷纷逃离。

q.en: Who is the owner of the Grand Hotel?

options.en: Horatzio Hoteltail, an old friend of Geronimo
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩的老朋友霍拉蒂奥·霍特尔泰尔

explain.en: The newsmouse interviews Horatzio Hoteltail, the owner of the Grand Hotel, who cries and offers to refund all the guests.
explain.zh: 新闻鼠采访了大酒店的主人霍拉蒂奥·霍特尔泰尔，他哭着表示愿意退还所有客人的钱。

q.en: Which room number has been secretly reserved for Geronimo?
q.zh: 有人偷偷为杰罗尼摩预订了哪个房间？

explain.en: The mysterious letter says, 'Go immediately to THE GRAND HOTEL. Room number 313 has been reserved for you.'
explain.zh: 那封神秘的信里写道：“立刻去大酒店。313号房间已经为你预订好了。”

q.en: Who is hiding behind the banana-patterned shower curtain in room 313?
q.zh: 藏在313号房间香蕉图案浴帘后面的是谁？

explain.en: A tail, paw, and snout pop out and say 'Peekaboo!' — it is Geronimo's detective friend Hercule Poirat playing a joke.
explain.zh: 窗帘后探出尾巴、爪子和鼻子，喊着“躲猫猫！”，原来是杰罗尼摩的侦探朋友赫拉克勒·波瓦在开玩笑。

q.en: What does the businessman Bradley Bigbottom want to turn the hotel into?
q.zh: 商人布拉德利·比格巴顿想把酒店变成什么？

explain.en: Horatzio fears he must sell the hotel to Bradley Bigbottom, who wants to turn it into 'A TOILET FACTORY!'
explain.zh: 霍拉蒂奥担心自己被迫把酒店卖给布拉德利·比格巴顿，而对方想把酒店变成“一家马桶工厂！”

q.en: What strange thing does the cook Sergio keep finding in the guests' soup?
q.zh: 厨师塞尔吉奥一直在美国客人的汤里发现什么奇怪的东西？

explain.en: Sergio says that for a month guests have complained about finding white fur in their soup, though no one in the kitchen has white fur.
explain.zh: 塞尔吉奥说，一个月来客人们一直抱怨在汤里发现白毛，可厨房里没人长着白毛。

q.en: What odd sound does the electrician Jack Joltson keep hearing?
q.zh: 电工杰克·乔尔森一直听到什么奇怪的声音？

explain.en: Jack tells Geronimo that ever since the haunting began, he keeps hearing eerie violin music, though the hotel has no stereo system.
explain.zh: 杰克告诉杰罗尼摩，自从闹鬼开始，他总听到诡异的小提琴声，可酒店并没有音响系统。

q.en: When the ghost is unmasked, who is really underneath the armor and wig?
q.zh: 当鬼被揭穿时，盔甲和假发下面真正的老鼠是谁？

explain.en: Hercule and Geronimo rip off the helmet and wig and discover the 'ghost' is Ms. Bertha, the hotel's director.
explain.zh: 赫拉克勒和杰罗尼摩扯下头盔和假发，发现“鬼”竟是酒店经理伯莎女士。

q.en: What do the initials B.B. on the trickster's tie stand for?
q.zh: 那个捣蛋鬼领带上“B.B.”两个字母代表什么？

explain.en: The short, thin rodent at the joke shop wears a tie embroidered with B.B., and later declares, 'my name isn't Bradley Bigbottom!'
explain.zh: 玩具店里那个又矮又瘦的老鼠打着绣有B.B.的领带，后来还叫嚷：“要不然我就不叫布拉德利·比格巴顿！”

q.en: Which wicked rodent are Bradley and Bertha working with to take over Mouse Island?
q.zh: 布拉德利和伯莎在帮哪只坏老鼠夺取老鼠岛？

explain.en: The book reveals Bertha and Bradley are in cahoots with Sleezer, a wicked rodent who wants to take over Mouse Island.
explain.zh: 书中揭示，伯莎和布拉德利与想夺取老鼠岛的坏老鼠斯利泽是一伙的。
